citation.title: AI Projects  (2).pdf
citation.context_snippet: achieve their goals with efficiency and reliability. 2 AI Projects Project 1: AI-Powered Compliance Monitoring System Client: Johnson & Johnson Industry: Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Focus: Tablets and Drug Production Departments Involved: Production & Warehouse Challenge: Johnson & Johnson needed a reliable way to monitor hygiene compliance, specifically identifying employees who were not wearing hand gloves during production—a critical requirement in pharmaceutical manufacturing. Our Solution: We implemented an AI-powered intelligent CCTV monitoring system designed to automatically detect glove compliance in real time. Impact: Our custom-built AI model accurately recognized each employee and analyzed whether they were wearing gloves while on the production floor. This real-time monitoring helped Johnson & Johnson enhance safety, maintain regulatory standards, and reduce the risk of contamination. Technologies Used: ● Hardware: NVIDIA Edge Devices ● Software & Frameworks: NVIDIA DeepStream, Custom Object Detection Models, Python, React ● Databases: SQL, MongoDB ● Deployment: Docker-based containerized environment 3 4 Project 2: AI-Based PPE Compliance Monitoring System Client: ITC Industry: Manufacturing Manufacturing Focus: Paper Recycling Department: Production Challenge: ITC needed a solution to ensure strict adherence to safety protocols on the production floor. Specifically, they wanted to identify employees who were not wearing full PPE kits, including helmets, jackets, and safety shoes. Our Solution: We developed a smart surveillance system by integrating CCTV cameras with an AI- powered computer vision model. This system automatically detects and monitors PPE

summary.reply:
Desire Infoweb has completed several vision-based AI projects, including:

- **Compliance Monitoring Systems**: For Johnson & Johnson and ITC, using AI-powered CCTV to ensure hygiene and PPE compliance.
- **Warehouse Logistics Tracking**: For Mahindra, monitoring box movements, employee involvement, and vehicle loading/unloading efficiency.
- **Vehicle Monitoring & Space Utilization**: For Siemens and IRB Infrastructure, tracking vehicle types, time spent, and space usage.
- **Crowd Flow Analytics**: For GMR, analyzing foot and vehicle traffic patterns in commercial spaces.
- **Election Vote Digitization**: For the Indian Election Commission, automating vote count extraction using computer vision and OCR.

These projects utilize advanced AI models, NVIDIA hardware, and scalable deployment frameworks.

citation.context_snippet: to leveraging cutting-edge tools to enhance operations and improve service delivery. Technologies Used: Software & Frameworks: Azure OpenAI, SharePoint Online, MS Teams, Typescript , React , Azure Blob storage , Semantic search , Vectorization Databases: SharePoint Deployment: Azure Cloud Service 25 26 Project 13: Fluentify AI - Enhancing Language Proficiency with AI Client: Internal Project Industry: Education & Technology Focus Area: AI-Driven Language Assessment Department: IT & Education Challenge: The challenge was to develop an AI-powered language assessment tool that integrates with Microsoft Teams to help professionals, educators, and organizations enhance their spoken communication skills. The goal was to provide detailed feedback and scores on key aspects of spoken language, such as pronunciation, grammar, vocabulary, and fluency. Our Solution: We developed Fluentify AI, an AI-powered language assessment tool designed to seamlessly integrate with Microsoft Teams. This innovative tool retrieves meeting recordings, allowing users to select and process them for comprehensive analysis. 27 Utilizing the Azure Pronunciation Assessment Service, Fluentify AI evaluates key aspects of spoken language, including pronunciation, grammar, and vocabulary. The system provides detailed feedback, scores, corrections, and in-depth analysis. Additionally, it offers practice exercises tailored to help users improve their spoken communication skills effectively. Impact: Fluentify AI offers a comprehensive solution for enhancing language proficiency through data-driven insights and AI-powered assessments. It helps users improve their spoken

summary.reply:
**Fluentify AI** is an advanced solution designed to enhance language proficiency through AI-driven insights and assessments. It is ideal for professionals, educators, and organizations aiming to improve spoken communication. Key features include:

- **AI-Powered Language Assessment**: Evaluate and improve communication skills.
- **Recording Integration**: Process recordings from MS Teams, Zoom, and Google Meet.
- **Collaborative Feedback**: Share insights and feedback for continuous improvement.
- **Skill Optimization**: Tailored recommendations to refine communication.

Learn more: [Fluentify AI](https://desireinfoweb.com/services/ai)

Microsoft SharePoint Microsoft PowerApps Microsoft Power Automate Microsoft Power BI .Net Core Web Development Azure Services AI Services Azure DevOps SEO Dynamics365 CRM Flutter Development What is SEO Search Engine Optimization improves website visibility and ranking in organic search results. SEO involves optimizing content, site structure, and technical aspects to help search engines understand and rank content for relevant queries. summary.reply:
The **Plastic Product** case study refers to an SEO project Desire Infoweb executed for a plastic product manufacturing company. 

### Key Details:
- **Challenges**:
  - Limited organic search visibility.
  - High competition in the industry.
  - Under-optimized website content.
  - Technical performance issues.

- **Solutions**:
  - High-value keyword optimization.
  - Quality backlink strategy.
  - Content structuring for AI search.
  - FAQ optimization.

- **Impact**:
  - Improved rankings for high-intent keywords (e.g., industrial lockers & equipment).
  - Increased organic traffic through better content targeting.
  - Enhanced commercial visibility, leading to more inbound business inquiries.

This project showcases Desire Infoweb's expertise in driving measurable SEO results for competitive industries.

Traditional keyword search was often insufficient for answering specific contextual questions. Our Solution: We implemented a lightweight, embedded AI Chatbot directly into the SharePoint environment using the SharePoint Framework (SPFx) Application Customizer. ● Floating Widget: The bot is available as a non-intrusive popup on every SharePoint page, ensuring help is always one click away. ● Document Q&A: Users can ask natural language questions (e.g., "What is the policy on remote work?"), and the AI scans the documents in the site to provide a precise answer with citations. Impact: This tool transformed the SharePoint experience from a passive file storage system into an active knowledge hub. The goal was to provide detailed feedback and scores on key aspects of spoken language, such as pronunciation, grammar, vocabulary, and fluency. Our Solution: We developed Fluentify AI, an AI-powered language assessment tool designed to seamlessly integrate with Microsoft Teams. This innovative tool retrieves meeting recordings, allowing users to select and process them for comprehensive analysis. 27 Utilizing the Azure Pronunciation Assessment Service, Fluentify AI evaluates key aspects of spoken language, including pronunciation, grammar, and vocabulary. The system provides detailed feedback, scores, corrections, and in-depth analysis. Additionally, it offers practice exercises tailored to help users improve their spoken communication skills effectively. SANAS stands for the South African National Accreditation System. It is South Africa's national body responsible for accreditation the formal process of certifying that organizations (like testing labs, inspection bodies, and certification bodies) are competent to carry out specific technical activities according to recognized standards. Key Modules Schedule of Accreditation Manages technical scope, standards, and methods with structured approval workflows Accreditation Search Advanced filtering and lookup for accredited organizations and entities Assessment Process Complete lifecycle management with stage-based tracking and approvals Tender Management End-to-end procurement lifecycle from creation to award and closure Schedule of Accreditation (SOA) Manages technical scope of accreditation for each legal entity Problem Statement Manual inconsistencies Lack of trac

summary.reply:
**SANAS** stands for the **South African National Accreditation System**, which is South Africa's official body responsible for accreditation. It certifies organizations like testing labs, inspection bodies, and certification bodies to ensure they meet recognized technical standards.

Desire Infoweb offers a **Comprehensive Accreditation Management Solution** for SANAS, featuring:

- **Schedule of Accreditation (SOA)**: Centralized scope management with workflows.
- **Accreditation Search**: Advanced filtering for accredited entities.
- **Assessment Process**: End-to-end lifecycle tracking.
- **Tender Management**: Full procurement lifecycle automation.

For more details, visit [Desire Infoweb SANAS Solutions](https://desireinfoweb.com).
